    f.write\(data\)
print\('CRLF applied. Size:', len\(data\)\)
")

Bash(python -c "
with open\('D:/MUSIQ/ALGT/clarion_projects/quickdraw-types/QuickDrawTypes.clw', 'rb'\) as f:
    data = f.read\(\)
lf_only = data.count\(b'\\n'\) - data.count\(b'\\r\\n'\)
print\(f'CRLF count: {data.count\(b\\"\\\\r\\\\n\\"\)}'\)
print\(f'Bare LF count: {lf_only}'\)
print\(f'File size: {len\(data\)} bytes'\)
" 2>/dev/null || python3 -c "
with open\('D:/MUSIQ/ALGT/clarion_projects/quickdraw-types/QuickDrawTypes.clw', 'rb'\) as f:
    data = f.read\(\)
lf_only = data.count\(b'\\n'\) - data.count\(b'\\r\\n'\)
print\(f'CRLF count: {data.count\(chr\(13\).encode\(\) + chr\(10\).encode\(\)\)}'\)
print\(f'Bare LF count: {lf_only}'\)
")

Bash(cat > /tmp/check_crlf.py << 'PYEOF'
with open\('D:/MUSIQ/ALGT/clarion_projects/quickdraw-types/QuickDrawTypes.clw', 'rb'\) as f:
    data = f.read\(\)
crlf = data.count\(b'\\r\\n'\)
lf_only = data.count\(b'\\n'\) - crlf
print\(f'CRLF count: {crlf}'\)
print\(f'Bare LF count: {lf_only}'\)
print\(f'File size: {len\(data\)} bytes'\)
PYEOF
python /tmp/check_crlf.py)
